## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`make test` / `go test ./...` / `npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint` / `npm run lint`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification in the PR description
- [ ] Any new dependency versions are pinned exactly (no `^`, `~`, or `@latest`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in code, tests, or sample files
- [ ] `go mod tidy` run if Go deps changed
- [ ] `Chart.yaml` version bumped if chart templates or defaults changed (helm-charts only)
